metadata.description: A PMBOK-aligned Project Plan Starter Pack for Claude. Produces a premium-editorial, client-ready Gantt chart and milestone tracker in three synchronised formats (Excel, interactive HTML, PowerPoint) from a structured project brief or an MCP-connected PM tool like Monday.com, ClickUp, Jira, or Asana. Supports per-client branding — primary and accent colour customisation, optional logo — so the same plan can ship across every account in your book.

plugins.name: ai-pm-project-plan
plugins.description: Generate a premium-editorial project plan package (Gantt + milestone tracker + status snapshot) across Excel, HTML, and PowerPoint. Designed for project managers who need consistent, brand-aligned, client-ready artefacts. Rebrandable per client with a primary colour, an accent colour, and an optional logo. Works from a structured project brief or live data pulled via MCP from Monday.com, ClickUp, Jira, Asana, or Linear.
